category: Professional skincare products for barrier repair and sensitive skin
audience: Skincare-conscious consumers and professional skincare buyers

evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page identifies Example Barrier Skincare as a professional skincare brand focused on barrier-supporting products.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The target has basic brand entity evidence and a clear skincare category association.

evidence_items.source_title: Example Barrier Skincare in Hong Kong
evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page explains that the brand is available for professional skincare buyers and sensitive-skin consumers in Hong Kong.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The target has basic Hong Kong market relevance evidence, but limited proof and comparison depth.

evidence_items.source_title: Clinical Derm Brand A Clinical Results
evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page summarizes clinical-use proof points, professional adoption, and dermatologist-oriented trust signals.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has stronger proof and trust evidence than the target.

evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page compares professional skincare options by use case, sensitivity, and clinic recommendation context.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has comparison-oriented evidence that can support alternatives and shortlist prompts.

evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page maps products to barrier repair, redness, post-treatment care, and sensitive-skin routines.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has clearer use-case evidence than the target.

evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page describes professional skincare partnerships, education programs, and clinic-facing support.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has authority and association evidence for professional recommendation contexts.

evidence_items.source_title: Professional Skincare Brands for Sensitive Skin
evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The article-style page references Luxury Skin Clinic Brand C in a professional skincare roundup for sensitive-skin buyers.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has external-style corroboration evidence in the demo fixture.

evidence_items.source_title: New Hong Kong Sensitive-Skin Treatment Routines
evidence_items.excerpt_or_summary: The page describes recent Hong Kong-oriented skincare routines and professional treatment support.
evidence_items.observed_claim: The retrieved brand has recent market-relevant evidence tied to Hong Kong skincare needs.
